hero.headline: No more spreadsheets. Smooth collaboration between coach and athlete.
hero.subheadline: Ditch the chaotic sheets and manual updates. Synek is a simple tool that connects the coach's plan with the athlete's execution. Try our free beta.
hero.betaNote: Your feedback shapes what we build next.

whySynek.title: Why Synek?
whySynek.subtitle: Because planning training in spreadsheets is exhausting.

card1.title: No more manual entry
card1.desc: Forget about typing in results after every session. Synek and Strava do it for you.

card2.title: Everything in one place
card2.desc: Instead of scattered messages and document links — one, always up-to-date weekly view.

card3.title: Full control, zero chaos
card3.desc: Coaches see the whole team's progress on one screen, while athletes focus solely on today's workout.

card4.title: We're building this together
card4.desc: We're in a free beta. We listen to coaches and athletes to build exactly what you need.

features.title: Simple tools, real results
features.subtitle: Designed to save time — yours and your athletes'. No unnecessary fluff.

item1.title: Clear weekly view
item1.desc: Quick overview of load, notes, and sessions. Built around the natural training cycle.

item2.title: Sport-specific sessions
item2.desc: Run, bike, strength, or recovery — every activity has its dedicated parameters.

item3.title: Two perspectives
item3.desc: A coach panel to manage the whole group, and a clean athlete view focused on getting the work done.

item4.title: Self-planning mode
item4.desc: Give experienced athletes free rein. You review, they build their own plan.

item5.title: Full automation
item5.desc: Connect your Strava account and watch completed workouts turn green automatically.

login.title: Log in to Synek
login.subtitle: Pick up where you left off.

beta.title: Create your free account
beta.subtitle: Free during beta. No credit card. No expiry.
beta.betaNote: You're joining our public beta. Free access, and a direct line to the team — we read every piece of feedback.
beta.name: Full name
beta.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number
beta.selectRole: Pick Coach or Athlete to continue
beta.emailAlreadyRegistered: That email is already registered. Try logging in instead.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.subtitle: Got feedback, a question, or an idea? We're a small team and we read everything.
contact.betaNote: This is the fastest way to shape what we build next.
contact.name: Your name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's missing, what's broken, or what could be better...
contact.submitSuccess: Message sent — thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
